category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an extendable open source continuous integration server; official Jenkins docs describe Jenkins as an open source automation server.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is jenkins; official website and GitHub repository use 'Jenkins'.
docs_sources: Official Jenkins User Documentation is at https://www.jenkins.io/doc/.
repo_sources: Official Jenkins GitHub README identifies jenkinsci/jenkins as the source repository for Jenkins.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies continuous integration; official GitHub README topics include java, jenkins, devops, continuous-integration, continuous-delivery, and cicd.
